inputs.label: Base City Rent
inputs.businessContext: Average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the base city.

inputs.label: Base City Utilities
inputs.businessContext: Monthly cost of basic utilities (electricity, water, heating, garbage) for a standard apartment.

inputs.label: Base City Groceries
inputs.businessContext: Monthly grocery bill for a single person in the base city.

inputs.label: Base City Transportation
inputs.businessContext: Monthly public transport pass or equivalent fuel costs in the base city.

inputs.label: Base City Misc. Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Other monthly living expenses (entertainment, clothing, personal care) in the base city.

inputs.label: Target City Cost of Living Index
inputs.businessContext: Cost of living index of the target city, relative to base city = 100. A value above 100 means it is more expensive.

outputs.primary: Equivalent monthly cost in target city: $${totalTargetCost.toFixed(2)}
